title: ZKProofArtifact
description: Protocol-owned scheme-agnostic proof object for one audited statement-family claim, including setup and public-input identities.

sourceRef.description: Typed immutable source reference bound to this proof artifact.

source_digest.description: Digest identity for the referenced source object.

source_role.description: Typed role of this source reference in statement binding semantics.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for scheme-agnostic proof artifacts.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this proof artifact.

statement_family.description: Machine-consumed statement-family identifier from the statement_family registry.

scheme_id.description: Scheme identifier for the proving system implementation.

curve_id.description: Curve identifier for the selected proving backend.

circuit_id.description: Circuit identifier from the circuit_id registry.

constraint_system_digest.description: Digest identity for the compiled frozen constraint-system artifact.

verifier_key_digest.description: Digest identity for verifier-key material used by this proof artifact.

setup_provenance_digest.description: Digest identity over canonical setup lineage object for this circuit and backend.

normalization_profile_id.description: Logical normalization profile identifier from the normalization_profile_id registry.

scheme_adapter_id.description: Scheme-adapter identifier from the scheme_adapter_id registry.

public_inputs.description: Public statement inputs disclosed by this proof artifact.

public_inputs_digest.description: Digest identity for canonicalized public_inputs content.

proof_bytes.description: Base64-encoded proof bytes for the selected proving scheme.

source_refs.description: Immutable typed source references used to bind this proof to authoritative evidence.
